Metadata.SourceFile: Strontium Dog and the Death Gauntlet.tap
Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x8681 "STRONTIUMDOG-5100-8681" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $5100 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Strontium Dog and the Death Gauntlet.prg"
Metadata.Notes: This game has a BASIC program to display instructions for the game, so the following steps were taken to retain this: 1. When the instructions were shown, the BASIC program from $0801 to $0F84 was dumped to disk. This is because the intro program gets overwritten later when the game is loaded. 2. The BASIC program was modified so that the LOAD instruction on line 450 was changed to SYS 34433 ($8681) to start the game after the instructions are shown 3. When the breakpoint at $8681 was hit, the memory between $5066 and $5FFF was zeroed out (this area contains assembly source left over from development of the game and is not needed) 4. The modified BASIC program dumped in step 1 was placed at $5201 and relinked with the BASIC subroutine at $A533 5. A new routine was placed at $5100 which sets up the correct VICII settings and necessary BASIC pointers and runs the instructions program
